description: Style NoteWith this Climacool enabled performance T-shirt, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of performance fabrics keeps cool air flowing in and heat and sweat flowing out, meaning you can stay dry and comfortable, performing at your peak in even the most heated competition. On a day off, pair it with denims and cool sneakers to look your casual best.Product DetailsBlack polo T-shirt that has short sleeves with a buttoned closure at the cuffs, short buttoned placket, patch pockets on either sides of the chest with buttoned closures, mesh panels on the back and branding on the backMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
